title: Restoring archives, workspace

posts.author: Adurm (Adam Cranch)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please, it is really necessary to be able to see the workspace when restoring boards.

It is very difficult when there are boards that are named the same or similar between workspaces ( as is sometimes a requirement in our organization).

chrome_mvwPEBCj4r2158×849 67.9 KB

It would also be really helpful to filter by a workspace, or for that workspace to be restored, or recreated (if the workspace no longer exists ).

I feel these are super important and overlooked features.
